message:
fix(codegen): Add error union return type when __init__ can raise

Added bodyCanRaise() helper to detect if function body contains raise
statements. When __init__ body can raise, the init() method now returns
!@This() instead of @This().

Also track classes with error-returning init in error_init_classes map
so instantiation calls can use `try`.

Applied to:
- genInitMethod: standard __init__
- genInitMethodWithBuiltinBase: __init__ with builtin parent
- genInitMethodFromNew: init from __new__
